intent.objective: Show subagent strategy validation blocks incomplete delegated strategies.

subagent_strategy.trigger: Dialectic overlay selected for competing design principles.
subagent_strategy.explanation: Subagents are recommended, but the route failed to name role ownership.
subagent_strategy.permission_prompt: Run delegated dialectic reviewers before execution?

steps.name: Review design tension
stop_conditions: block if the route cannot name delegated roles

gates.condition: Subagent strategy must be shown and approved before execution.
